shortDescription.en: Sizzling grilled meat with peppers and onions, served with tortillas and toppings to assemble at the table.
shortDescription.zh: 铁板烤肉配甜椒、洋葱和饼皮上桌，通常自己包成卷吃。
shortDescription.nl: Sissend gegrild vlees met paprika en ui, geserveerd met tortilla's en toppings om zelf te vullen.

cookingProfile.en: Expect hot strips of meat and vegetables, plus soft tortillas rather than a pre-built taco.
cookingProfile.zh: 通常是热的肉条和蔬菜，旁边配软饼，不是已经卷好的 taco。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht warme reepjes vlees en groente met zachte tortilla's, niet een kant-en-klare taco.

description.en: Fajitas is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: grilled meat, peppers and onions, warm tortillas.
description.zh: 墨西哥铁板肉菜 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：grilled meat、peppers and onions、warm tortillas。
description.nl: Fajitas blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: grilled meat, peppers and onions, warm tortillas.

orderVerdict.en: Good for sharing and easy customization; skip if you want a saucy plated dish instead of assembling bites.
orderVerdict.zh: 适合分享，也方便自己调整配料；如果想要一盘带酱汁的成品菜，可以跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed om te delen en zelf samen te stellen; sla over als je liever een sausachtig bordgerecht wilt.

shortDescription.en: Crisp flat tortillas topped with beans, meat or seafood, salsa, lettuce, crema, and cheese.
shortDescription.zh: 炸脆的平玉米饼上铺豆泥、肉或海鲜、莎莎、生菜、酸奶油和奶酪。
shortDescription.nl: Knapperige platte tortilla's met bonen, vlees of zeevruchten, salsa, sla, crema en kaas.

cookingProfile.en: Served as crunchy open-faced shells; they can be messy but should feel fresh and crisp.
cookingProfile.zh: 像开放式脆饼上桌，吃起来容易掉料，但重点是清爽和酥脆。
cookingProfile.nl: Geserveerd als open krokante schelpen; wat rommelig, maar fris en knapperig.

description.en: Tostadas is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: crisp tortilla, beans, salsa.
description.zh: 墨西哥脆玉米饼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：crisp tortilla、beans、salsa。
description.nl: Tostadas blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: crisp tortilla, beans, salsa.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for a crunchy, fresh snack or light meal; avoid if you dislike messy open-faced dishes.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃清爽酥脆的小食或轻餐可以点；不喜欢开放式易掉料的菜则不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor een frisse, knapperige snack of lichte maaltijd; vermijd als rommelige open gerechten je niet liggen.

shortDescription.en: Thick masa cakes with raised edges, usually topped with beans, meat, salsa, lettuce, crema, and cheese.
shortDescription.zh: 厚玉米 masa 小饼边缘略高，上面常放豆泥、肉、莎莎、生菜、酸奶油和奶酪。
shortDescription.nl: Dikke masakoekjes met opstaande rand, vaak met bonen, vlees, salsa, sla, crema en kaas.

cookingProfile.en: The base is thicker and softer than a tostada, with toppings sitting in the shallow rim.
cookingProfile.zh: 底部比 tostada 更厚更软，配料会放在浅浅的边缘内。
cookingProfile.nl: De bodem is dikker en zachter dan een tostada, met toppings in de lage rand.

description.en: Sopes is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: masa base, beans, salsa.
description.zh: 墨西哥厚玉米饼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：masa base、beans、salsa。
description.nl: Sopes blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: masa base, beans, salsa.

orderVerdict.en: A good choice if you want a filling corn-based street-food bite; ask about the topping if avoiding pork or dairy.
orderVerdict.zh: 想要有饱腹感的玉米小食时适合点；不吃猪肉或奶制品要先问配料。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als je een vullende maissnack wilt; vraag naar de topping bij geen varken of zuivel.

shortDescription.en: Thick split masa pockets filled with meat, beans, cheese, salsa, or other savory fillings.
shortDescription.zh: 厚玉米 masa 饼切开后夹肉、豆、奶酪、莎莎或其他咸味馅。
shortDescription.nl: Dikke opengesneden masapockets gevuld met vlees, bonen, kaas, salsa of andere hartige vulling.

cookingProfile.en: More like a stuffed corn pocket than a taco, with a soft, dense bite.
cookingProfile.zh: 更像夹馅玉米口袋饼，不是薄 taco，口感更厚实柔软。
cookingProfile.nl: Meer een gevulde maispocket dan een taco, met een zachte, compacte beet.

description.en: Gorditas is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: thick masa, savory filling, salsa.
description.zh: 墨西哥夹馅玉米饼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：thick masa、savory filling、salsa。
description.nl: Gorditas blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: thick masa, savory filling, salsa.

orderVerdict.en: Good when you want a hearty handheld corn dish; skip if you prefer a thin crispy shell.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃厚实手拿玉米夹馅饼时很合适；偏好薄脆饼壳则不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een stevige handzame maisvulling; sla over als je een dunne krokante schelp zoekt.

shortDescription.en: Mexican street corn on the cob, usually coated with mayo or crema, cheese, chili, and lime.
shortDescription.zh: 墨西哥街头烤玉米棒，常抹蛋黄酱或酸奶油，撒奶酪、辣椒和青柠。
shortDescription.nl: Mexicaanse straatmais aan de kolf, vaak met mayo of crema, kaas, chili en limoen.

cookingProfile.en: Served hot as a whole cob, with creamy, salty, tangy coating rather than a plain vegetable side.
cookingProfile.zh: 通常整根热玉米上桌，外层是奶香、咸香和酸辣，不是普通蔬菜配菜。
cookingProfile.nl: Warm als hele kolf geserveerd, met romige zoute frisse laag in plaats van gewone groente.

description.en: Elote is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: grilled corn, crema or mayo, chili.
description.zh: 墨西哥街头玉米 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：grilled corn、crema or mayo、chili。
description.nl: Elote blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: grilled corn, crema or mayo, chili.

orderVerdict.en: A friendly sweet-salty street snack; skip if mayo, dairy, or messy corn on the cob is a problem.
orderVerdict.zh: 甜咸奶香的友好街头小食；如果介意蛋黄酱、奶制品或啃玉米棒会弄脏手，就不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Een toegankelijke zoet-zoute straatsnack; vermijd bij mayo, zuivel of als kluiven aan mais niet handig is.

shortDescription.en: Mexican corn kernels served in a cup with mayo or crema, cheese, chili, lime, and cooking liquid.
shortDescription.zh: 杯装墨西哥玉米粒，拌蛋黄酱或酸奶油、奶酪、辣椒、青柠和少量汤汁。
shortDescription.nl: Mexicaanse maiskorrels in een beker met mayo of crema, kaas, chili, limoen en wat kookvocht.

cookingProfile.en: It has elote flavors but is spoonable and softer, often warm and juicy.
cookingProfile.zh: 风味像 elote，但用勺吃，口感更软且多汁，通常热食。
cookingProfile.nl: Het smaakt als elote maar is lepelbaar, zachter en vaak warm en sappig.

description.en: Esquites is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: sweet corn, lime, chili.
description.zh: 墨西哥杯装玉米 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：sweet corn、lime、chili。
description.nl: Esquites blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: sweet corn, lime, chili.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it if you want elote flavor without eating from the cob; skip if creamy corn sounds too rich.
orderVerdict.zh: 想要 elote 风味但不想啃玉米棒时适合；不喜欢奶香玉米则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor elote-smaak zonder kolf; sla over als romige mais te zwaar klinkt.

shortDescription.en: Tortilla chips simmered in red or green salsa, often topped with crema, cheese, onion, and egg or chicken.
shortDescription.zh: 玉米脆片浸煮在红或绿莎莎里，常加酸奶油、奶酪、洋葱，以及鸡蛋或鸡肉。
shortDescription.nl: Tortillachips gestoofd in rode of groene salsa, vaak met crema, kaas, ui en ei of kip.

cookingProfile.en: The chips soften in sauce but should still have some edges; it is a saucy breakfast or brunch plate.
cookingProfile.zh: 脆片会被酱汁泡软但仍有边缘口感，是带酱的早餐或早午餐菜。
cookingProfile.nl: De chips worden zachter in de saus maar houden wat rand; een sausachtig ontbijt- of brunchbord.

description.en: Chilaquiles is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: salsa-soaked chips, crema, cheese.
description.zh: 墨西哥玉米片早餐 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：salsa-soaked chips、crema、cheese。
description.nl: Chilaquiles blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: salsa-soaked chips, crema, cheese.

orderVerdict.en: Great for a saucy Mexican breakfast plate; skip if you expect dry crunchy nachos.
orderVerdict.zh: 适合想吃带酱的墨西哥早餐；如果期待干脆 nachos 口感，不要点错。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een sausachtig Mexicaans ontbijtbord; verwacht geen droge knapperige nacho's.

shortDescription.en: Fried eggs on tortillas with tomato-chili salsa, beans, and sometimes avocado or cheese.
shortDescription.zh: 煎蛋铺在玉米饼上，配番茄辣椒莎莎、豆类，有时加牛油果或奶酪。
shortDescription.nl: Gebakken eieren op tortilla's met tomaat-chilisalsa, bonen en soms avocado of kaas.

cookingProfile.en: Usually served hot as a breakfast plate, with runny or set eggs depending on the kitchen.
cookingProfile.zh: 通常作为热早餐盘上桌，蛋黄流心或全熟取决于餐厅。
cookingProfile.nl: Meestal warm als ontbijtbord, met lopende of gestolde eieren afhankelijk van de keuken.

description.en: Huevos Rancheros is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: fried eggs, tomato-chili salsa, beans.
description.zh: 牧场鸡蛋 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：fried eggs、tomato-chili salsa、beans。
description.nl: Huevos rancheros blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: fried eggs, tomato-chili salsa, beans.

orderVerdict.en: A strong breakfast choice if you like eggs with salsa and beans; skip if eggs are not your thing.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢鸡蛋配莎莎和豆类早餐的话很稳；不吃鸡蛋就不适合。
orderVerdict.nl: Een stevige ontbijtkeuze als je eieren met salsa en bonen lekker vindt; vermijd als ei niets voor je is.

shortDescription.en: Slow-braised meat in a chile-spiced broth, often served as a stew with consommé, onion, cilantro, and lime.
shortDescription.zh: 辣椒香料汤汁慢炖肉，常以炖菜形式配清汤、洋葱、香菜和青柠上桌。
shortDescription.nl: Langzaam gestoofd vlees in chili-bouillon, vaak als stoofgerecht met consomme, ui, koriander en limoen.

cookingProfile.en: Expect tender shredded meat and a deep red broth, not a dry grilled meat plate.
cookingProfile.zh: 会是软烂肉丝和深红汤汁，不是干烤肉盘。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht zacht draadjesvlees en diepe rode bouillon, geen droog grillbord.

description.en: Birria is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: chile broth, slow-braised meat, cumin.
description.zh: 墨西哥慢炖肉汤 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：chile broth、slow-braised meat、cumin。
description.nl: Birria blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: chile broth, slow-braised meat, cumin.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for rich slow-braised meat and broth; skip if you want something light or not chile-based.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃浓郁慢炖肉和汤汁时很适合；想清淡或不吃辣椒底味则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor rijk langzaam gestoofd vlees met bouillon; sla over als je licht of zonder chili wilt eten.

shortDescription.en: Tacos filled with birria meat, often griddled until crisp and served with consommé for dipping.
shortDescription.zh: 玉米饼夹 birria 炖肉，常煎到外层微脆，并配炖汤蘸着吃。
shortDescription.nl: Taco's gevuld met birriavlees, vaak krokant gebakken en geserveerd met consomme om te dippen.

cookingProfile.en: The key cue is juicy braised meat plus a broth dip; they are richer than ordinary soft tacos.
cookingProfile.zh: 识别重点是多汁炖肉和蘸汤，比普通软 taco 更浓郁。
cookingProfile.nl: Het herkenningspunt is sappig stoofvlees met dipbouillon; rijker dan gewone zachte taco's.

description.en: Birria Tacos is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: birria meat, consommé dip, corn tortilla.
description.zh: 比利亚蘸汁塔可 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：birria meat、consommé dip、corn tortilla。
description.nl: Birria taco’s blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: birria meat, consommé dip, corn tortilla.

orderVerdict.en: A rich, popular taco choice if you like dipping and juicy meat; skip if you want a clean, light taco.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢蘸汤和多汁肉馅时很值得点；想吃清爽不油的 taco 则不适合。
orderVerdict.nl: Een rijke populaire taco als je van dippen en sappig vlees houdt; vermijd voor een lichte schone taco.

shortDescription.en: Slow-cooked Mexican meat, commonly beef, lamb, or goat, served tender with tortillas, salsa, onion, and cilantro.
shortDescription.zh: 墨西哥慢熟肉，常见牛、羊或山羊肉，肉质软烂，配饼、莎莎、洋葱和香菜。
shortDescription.nl: Langzaam gegaard Mexicaans vlees, vaak rund, lam of geit, met tortilla's, salsa, ui en koriander.

cookingProfile.en: Usually tender and shreddable, with seasoning depth rather than grill char.
cookingProfile.zh: 通常软烂可撕，重点是香料和慢煮风味，不是炭烤焦香。
cookingProfile.nl: Meestal mals en draadjesachtig, met kruidige diepte in plaats van grillschroeisel.

description.en: Barbacoa is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: slow-cooked meat, smoky chile, cilantro.
description.zh: 墨西哥慢烤肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：slow-cooked meat、smoky chile、cilantro。
description.nl: Barbacoa blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: slow-cooked meat, smoky chile, cilantro.

orderVerdict.en: Good if you want tender, deeply seasoned meat; ask which meat is used if you avoid lamb or beef.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃软烂香料肉时适合；如果不吃羊肉或牛肉，要先问具体肉类。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor mals diep gekruid vlees; vraag welk vlees wordt gebruikt als je lam of rund vermijdt.

shortDescription.en: Slow-cooked pork finished with crisp edges, usually served in tacos or as a filling with salsa and lime.
shortDescription.zh: 慢煮猪肉最后煎出微脆边缘，常作为 taco 或馅料配莎莎和青柠。
shortDescription.nl: Langzaam gegaard varkensvlees met krokante randjes, vaak in taco's of als vulling met salsa en limoen.

cookingProfile.en: Expect juicy pulled pork with browned edges, not a saucy stew.
cookingProfile.zh: 会是多汁猪肉丝带焦脆边，不是带汤汁的炖菜。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht sappig draadjesvarkensvlees met gebruinde rand, geen stoofsaus.

description.en: Carnitas is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: slow-cooked pork, crisp edges, salsa.
description.zh: 墨西哥慢炖猪肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：slow-cooked pork、crisp edges、salsa。
description.nl: Carnitas blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: slow-cooked pork, crisp edges, salsa.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for rich pork with crisp edges; skip if you avoid pork or want a leaner filling.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃带焦脆边的浓郁猪肉很适合；不吃猪肉或想清淡则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor rijk varkensvlees met krokante randjes; vermijd bij geen varken of als je mager wilt eten.

shortDescription.en: Marinated pork cooked on a vertical spit, usually served in tacos with pineapple, onion, cilantro, and salsa.
shortDescription.zh: 腌制猪肉在立式烤架上烤熟，常做成 taco，配菠萝、洋葱、香菜和莎莎。
shortDescription.nl: Gemarineerd varkensvlees van een verticale spit, vaak in taco's met ananas, ui, koriander en salsa.

cookingProfile.en: The cue is thin sliced pork with sweet pineapple and chile marinade, not generic grilled pork.
cookingProfile.zh: 关键是薄切猪肉、甜菠萝和辣椒腌料，不是普通烤猪肉。
cookingProfile.nl: Het herkenningspunt is dun gesneden varken met zoete ananas en chilimarinade, geen gewone grillvarkenslap.

description.en: Tacos al Pastor is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: achiote-chile marinade, spit-roasted pork, pineapple.
description.zh: 牧羊人猪肉塔可 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：achiote-chile marinade、spit-roasted pork、pineapple。
description.nl: Taco’s al pastor blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: achiote-chile marinade, spit-roasted pork, pineapple.

orderVerdict.en: A classic taco choice if you like pork with pineapple and chile marinade; skip if sweet-savory meat is not appealing.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢猪肉、菠萝和辣椒腌料的话很经典；不喜欢甜咸肉类则不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Een klassieke taco als je varken met ananas en chilimarinade lekker vindt; vermijd als zoet-hartig vlees niet trekt.

shortDescription.en: Yucatecan achiote-citrus pork, slow-cooked until tender and often served with pickled onion and tortillas.
shortDescription.zh: 尤卡坦风格胭脂树红柑橘猪肉，慢煮到软烂，常配腌洋葱和玉米饼。
shortDescription.nl: Yucataans achiote-citrusvarkensvlees, langzaam gaar met ingelegde ui en tortilla's.

cookingProfile.en: It should taste tangy, earthy, and deeply porky, with achiote giving the red color.
cookingProfile.zh: 风味应带酸香、土香和浓郁猪肉味，红色主要来自 achiote。
cookingProfile.nl: Het hoort friszuur, aards en rijk varkensachtig te smaken, met rode kleur door achiote.

description.en: Cochinita Pibil is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: achiote, citrus marinade, slow-cooked pork.
description.zh: 尤卡坦胭脂猪肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：achiote、citrus marinade、slow-cooked pork。
description.nl: Cochinita pibil blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: achiote, citrus marinade, slow-cooked pork.

orderVerdict.en: Excellent if you want tender citrusy pork; skip if you avoid pork or dislike earthy achiote flavor.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃柑橘酸香的软烂猪肉很适合；不吃猪肉或不喜欢 achiote 土香则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Uitstekend voor mals citrusachtig varkensvlees; vermijd bij geen varken of als achiote-aardsheid niet bevalt.

shortDescription.en: Yucatecan lime soup with chicken, tomato, chile, herbs, and crisp tortilla strips.
shortDescription.zh: 尤卡坦青柠鸡汤，常有鸡肉、番茄、辣椒、香草和炸玉米饼条。
shortDescription.nl: Yucataanse limoensoep met kip, tomaat, chili, kruiden en krokante tortillareepjes.

cookingProfile.en: Expect a clear, citrusy soup with chicken rather than a creamy or heavy broth.
cookingProfile.zh: 会是清爽柑橘感鸡汤，不是奶油浓汤或厚重汤底。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht een heldere citrusachtige kippensoep, geen romige of zware bouillon.

description.en: Sopa de Lima is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: lime, chicken broth, tortilla strips.
description.zh: 尤卡坦青柠鸡汤 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：lime、chicken broth、tortilla strips。
description.nl: Sopa de lima blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: lime, chicken broth, tortilla strips.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a bright, lighter soup; skip if sharp lime in broth is not your style.
orderVerdict.zh: 想要明亮清爽汤品时适合；不喜欢汤里明显青柠酸味则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een frisse lichte soep; sla over als duidelijke limoen in bouillon je niet ligt.

shortDescription.en: Raw shrimp or seafood cured in lime, chile, cucumber, and onion, served very fresh and spicy.
shortDescription.zh: 生虾或海鲜用青柠、辣椒、黄瓜和洋葱腌渍，通常非常清爽也偏辣。
shortDescription.nl: Rauwe garnaal of zeevruchten gemarineerd in limoen, chili, komkommer en ui, heel fris en pittig.

cookingProfile.en: It is closer to a raw cured seafood plate than a cooked shrimp dish.
cookingProfile.zh: 它更接近生腌海鲜冷盘，不是熟虾热菜。
cookingProfile.nl: Het lijkt meer op rauw gemarineerde zeevruchten dan op een gaar garnalengerecht.

description.en: Aguachile is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: lime cure, fresh chile, raw shrimp.
description.zh: 墨西哥辣青柠生虾 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：lime cure、fresh chile、raw shrimp。
description.nl: Aguachile blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: lime cure, fresh chile, raw shrimp.

orderVerdict.en: Choose only if you enjoy raw-cured seafood and bright heat; avoid for shellfish allergy or raw-food concerns.
orderVerdict.zh: 只有喜欢生腌海鲜和明亮辣味时才推荐；甲壳类过敏或避开生食时不要点。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies alleen als je rauw gemarineerde zeevruchten en felle pit lekker vindt; vermijd bij schaaldiersallergie of rauw-eten-zorg.

shortDescription.en: Sponge cake soaked with three milks, usually topped with whipped cream and sometimes cinnamon or fruit.
shortDescription.zh: 海绵蛋糕浸三种奶，通常覆打发奶油，有时加肉桂或水果。
shortDescription.nl: Sponscake gedrenkt in drie soorten melk, meestal met slagroom en soms kaneel of fruit.

cookingProfile.en: Served cool and very moist, with milk soaking through the cake rather than a dry crumb.
cookingProfile.zh: 冷食，蛋糕非常湿润，奶液会渗透蛋糕体，不是干松蛋糕。
cookingProfile.nl: Koel geserveerd en heel vochtig, met melk door de cake in plaats van droge kruim.

description.en: Tres Leches Cake is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: milk soak, cream, soft sponge.
description.zh: 三奶蛋糕 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：milk soak、cream、soft sponge。
description.nl: Tres leches cake blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: milk soak, cream, soft sponge.

orderVerdict.en: A safe choice for a soft milky dessert; skip if you dislike very moist cake.
orderVerdict.zh: 想要柔软奶香甜点时很稳；不喜欢湿润蛋糕就不适合。
orderVerdict.nl: Een veilige keuze voor een zachte melkachtige dessert; vermijd als je erg vochtige cake niet lekker vindt.

shortDescription.en: Mexican rice pudding simmered with milk, sugar, cinnamon, and sometimes raisins.
shortDescription.zh: 墨西哥米布丁，用牛奶、糖、肉桂慢煮，有时加葡萄干。
shortDescription.nl: Mexicaanse rijstpudding met melk, suiker, kaneel en soms rozijnen.

cookingProfile.en: Usually creamy and spoonable, served warm or chilled depending on the restaurant.
cookingProfile.zh: 通常奶香浓稠，用勺吃，餐厅可能热食也可能冷食。
cookingProfile.nl: Meestal romig en lepelbaar, warm of gekoeld afhankelijk van het restaurant.

description.en: Mexican Arroz con Leche is kept as a verified mexican reference because its ordering cues are specific: cinnamon, milk, soft rice.
description.zh: 墨西哥米布丁 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：cinnamon、milk、soft rice。
description.nl: Mexicaanse rijstpudding blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: cinnamon, milk, soft rice.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for a gentle cinnamon rice pudding; skip if creamy rice desserts are not appealing.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃温和肉桂米布丁时适合；不喜欢奶香米类甜点则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor zachte kaneel-rijstpudding; vermijd als romige rijstdesserts je niet aanspreken.

shortDescription.en: Moroccan lamb skewers seasoned with cumin, paprika, herbs, and charcoal grill flavor.
shortDescription.zh: 摩洛哥羊肉串，以孜然、红椒粉和香草调味，带炭烤香。
shortDescription.nl: Marokkaanse lamsspiesen met komijn, paprika, kruiden en houtskoolgrillgeur.

cookingProfile.en: Served hot as skewered grilled meat, often with bread, salad, or fries.
cookingProfile.zh: 热的烤肉串上桌，常配面包、沙拉或薯条。
cookingProfile.nl: Warm als gegrilde spiesen, vaak met brood, salade of friet.

description.en: Lamb Brochettes is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: lamb, cumin, char grill.
description.zh: 摩洛哥羊肉串 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：lamb、cumin、char grill。
description.nl: Lamsbrochettes blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: lamb, cumin, char grill.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for straightforward grilled lamb; skip if you dislike lamb's stronger flavor.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃直接的烤羊肉很合适；不喜欢羊肉膻香则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor direct gegrild lamsvlees; vermijd als je de sterke lamssmaak niet lekker vindt.

shortDescription.en: Ground meat skewers mixed with onion, parsley, cumin, paprika, and warm Moroccan spices.
shortDescription.zh: 肉末串混合洋葱、欧芹、孜然、红椒粉和摩洛哥暖香料。
shortDescription.nl: Gehaktspiesen met ui, peterselie, komijn, paprika en warme Marokkaanse specerijen.

cookingProfile.en: More tender and seasoned than plain meat cubes, usually grilled and served hot.
cookingProfile.zh: 比普通肉块更软更多香料，通常热烤上桌。
cookingProfile.nl: Zachter en kruidiger dan vleesblokjes, meestal warm gegrild.

description.en: Kefta Brochettes is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: ground meat, cumin, parsley.
description.zh: 摩洛哥肉末烤串 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：ground meat、cumin、parsley。
description.nl: Kefta brochettes blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: ground meat, cumin, parsley.

orderVerdict.en: Good if you like juicy spiced minced-meat skewers; skip if you want a very plain grill.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢多汁香料肉末串时适合；想要极简原味烤肉则不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor sappige kruidige gehaktspiesen; sla over als je heel simpele grill wilt.

shortDescription.en: Moroccan chicken with lentils and fenugreek served over shredded msemen or thin bread.
shortDescription.zh: 摩洛哥鸡肉扁豆葫芦巴炖菜，铺在撕碎的 msemen 或薄饼上。
shortDescription.nl: Marokkaanse kip met linzen en fenegriek over gescheurde msemen of dun brood.

cookingProfile.en: Expect a saucy, aromatic chicken dish where bread soaks up the broth.
cookingProfile.zh: 会是带汤汁的香料鸡肉，下面的饼会吸收汤汁。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht een sausachtig aromatisch kipgerecht waarbij brood de bouillon opneemt.

description.en: Rfissa is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: fenugreek, saffron, braised chicken.
description.zh: 摩洛哥鸡肉扁豆面饼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：fenugreek、saffron、braised chicken。
description.nl: Rfissa blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: fenugreek, saffron, braised chicken.

orderVerdict.en: A hearty regional comfort dish; skip if you dislike bread soaked in sauce or fenugreek aroma.
orderVerdict.zh: 这是很有饱腹感的地方家常菜；不喜欢泡汤饼或葫芦巴香气则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Een stevig regionaal comfortgerecht; vermijd als je geweekt brood of fenegriekaroma niet lekker vindt.

shortDescription.en: Marrakesh-style slow-cooked meat, usually lamb or beef, with preserved lemon, cumin, garlic, and saffron.
shortDescription.zh: 马拉喀什风格慢炖肉，常用羊或牛，配腌柠檬、孜然、蒜和藏红花。
shortDescription.nl: Marrakesh-stijl langzaam gegaard vlees, vaak lam of rund, met ingelegde citroen, komijn, knoflook en saffraan.

cookingProfile.en: It should be very tender and deeply savory, with citrus-spice depth rather than a thick tomato sauce.
cookingProfile.zh: 肉应非常软烂，咸鲜中带柑橘香料深度，不是厚番茄酱炖肉。
cookingProfile.nl: Het hoort zeer mals en diep hartig te zijn, met citrus-kruiddiepte in plaats van dikke tomatensaus.

description.en: Tanjia is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: preserved lemon, slow-cooked lamb, cumin.
description.zh: 马拉喀什慢炖肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：preserved lemon、slow-cooked lamb、cumin。
description.nl: Tanjia blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: preserved lemon, slow-cooked lamb, cumin.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for tender slow-cooked meat with preserved-lemon depth; skip if lamb or rich stews are not appealing.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃腌柠檬香的软烂慢炖肉时适合；不喜欢羊肉或浓炖菜则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor mals stoofvlees met ingelegde-citroendiepte; vermijd als lam of rijke stoof niet aanspreekt.

shortDescription.en: Moroccan fava bean soup or puree, often finished with olive oil, cumin, paprika, and bread.
shortDescription.zh: 摩洛哥蚕豆浓汤或豆泥，常淋橄榄油，撒孜然和红椒粉，配面包。
shortDescription.nl: Marokkaanse tuinbonensoep of puree met olijfolie, komijn, paprika en brood.

cookingProfile.en: It is humble, thick, and beany, closer to a dip-soup than a clear broth.
cookingProfile.zh: 朴实浓稠豆香，更像豆泥汤，不是清汤。
cookingProfile.nl: Bescheiden, dik en bonig, meer dip-soep dan heldere bouillon.

description.en: Bissara is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: fava beans, olive oil, cumin.
description.zh: 摩洛哥蚕豆汤 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：fava beans、olive oil、cumin。
description.nl: Bissara blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: fava beans, olive oil, cumin.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a simple earthy bean soup; skip if you want a complex meat dish.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃朴实豆香汤/豆泥时适合；想要复杂肉菜则不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een eenvoudige aardse bonensoep; sla over als je een complex vleesgerecht wilt.

shortDescription.en: Moroccan white bean stew in tomato sauce with garlic, cumin, paprika, and olive oil.
shortDescription.zh: 摩洛哥白豆番茄炖菜，带蒜、孜然、红椒粉和橄榄油。
shortDescription.nl: Marokkaanse wittebonenstoof in tomatensaus met knoflook, komijn, paprika en olijfolie.

cookingProfile.en: Expect soft beans in a warm tomato-spice sauce, often eaten with bread.
cookingProfile.zh: 会是软白豆配温暖番茄香料汁，常用面包蘸着吃。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht zachte bonen in warme tomaat-kruidensaus, vaak met brood gegeten.

description.en: Loubia is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: white beans, tomato sauce, cumin.
description.zh: 摩洛哥白豆炖菜 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：white beans、tomato sauce、cumin。
description.nl: Loubia blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: white beans, tomato sauce, cumin.

orderVerdict.en: A comforting bean stew and a solid vegetarian-style choice; skip if beans feel too heavy.
orderVerdict.zh: 这是舒服的豆类炖菜，也是不错的素食型选择；觉得豆子太撑就跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Een troostrijke bonenstoof en goede vegetarische keuze; vermijd als bonen te zwaar voelen.

shortDescription.en: Moroccan fried potato patties, often seasoned with herbs and spices and served as a snack or sandwich filling.
shortDescription.zh: 摩洛哥炸土豆饼，常加香草香料，可作小食或夹进三明治。
shortDescription.nl: Marokkaanse gefrituurde aardappelkoekjes met kruiden, als snack of broodvulling.

cookingProfile.en: Served hot and crisp outside with a soft potato center.
cookingProfile.zh: 热食上桌，外脆内软，是土豆馅心。
cookingProfile.nl: Warm geserveerd, krokant buiten en zacht aardappelig binnen.

description.en: Maakouda is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: potato, cumin, parsley.
description.zh: 摩洛哥炸土豆饼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：potato、cumin、parsley。
description.nl: Maakouda blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: potato, cumin, parsley.

orderVerdict.en: Good as a warm fried potato snack; skip if you avoid fried food or egg binders.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃热的炸土豆小食时适合；避开油炸或鸡蛋时不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als warme gefrituurde aardappelsnack; vermijd bij gefrituurd eten of ei.

shortDescription.en: Small Moroccan semolina-wheat pocket bread, often served with dips or filled as a sandwich.
shortDescription.zh: 小号摩洛哥粗粒麦粉口袋面包，常配蘸酱或夹馅吃。
shortDescription.nl: Klein Marokkaans griesmeel-tarwebroodje, met dips of gevuld als sandwich.

cookingProfile.en: Soft and bready rather than crisp, usually a supporting bread item.
cookingProfile.zh: 口感柔软像面包，不是脆饼，通常是配菜或夹馅载体。
cookingProfile.nl: Zacht en broodachtig, niet krokant; meestal ondersteunend brood.

description.en: Batbout is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: semolina, soft bread, olive oil.
description.zh: 摩洛哥小圆面包 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：semolina、soft bread、olive oil。
description.nl: Batbout blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: semolina, soft bread, olive oil.

orderVerdict.en: Order it as soft bread for dips or fillings; skip if you need a full main course.
orderVerdict.zh: 适合作为配蘸酱或夹馅的软面包；想要完整主菜则不够。
orderVerdict.nl: Bestel als zacht brood voor dips of vulling; sla over als je een volwaardig hoofdgerecht zoekt.

shortDescription.en: Layered Moroccan square flatbread, flaky and chewy, eaten plain, with honey, or with savory fillings.
shortDescription.zh: 摩洛哥方形分层煎饼，带韧性和层次，可配蜂蜜或咸馅。
shortDescription.nl: Gelaagd Marokkaans vierkant platbrood, vlokkig en taai, naturel, met honing of hartige vulling.

cookingProfile.en: Usually griddled with oil, so it is richer than plain bread.
cookingProfile.zh: 通常用油煎，油润感比普通面包更强。
cookingProfile.nl: Meestal met olie gebakken, dus rijker dan gewoon brood.

description.en: Msemen is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: layered dough, griddled oil, honey optional.
description.zh: 摩洛哥方形煎饼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：layered dough、griddled oil、honey optional。
description.nl: Msemen blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: layered dough, griddled oil, honey optional.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a flaky breakfast bread or side; skip if oily flatbread sounds too heavy.
orderVerdict.zh: 适合作为分层早餐饼或配菜；不喜欢油润煎饼则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als vlokkig ontbijtbrood of bijgerecht; vermijd als olieachtig platbrood te zwaar klinkt.

shortDescription.en: Spongy Moroccan semolina pancakes with many tiny holes, usually served with honey-butter syrup.
shortDescription.zh: 多孔海绵状摩洛哥粗粒麦粉薄饼，通常配蜂蜜黄油糖浆。
shortDescription.nl: Sponzige Marokkaanse griesmeelpannenkoekjes met veel gaatjes, vaak met honing-botersiroop.

cookingProfile.en: Soft and absorbent, made to soak up honey or butter rather than to be crisp.
cookingProfile.zh: 口感柔软吸汁，重点是吸收蜂蜜或黄油，不追求酥脆。
cookingProfile.nl: Zacht en absorberend, bedoeld voor honing of boter, niet krokant.

description.en: Baghrir is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: semolina pancake, honey, butter.
description.zh: 千孔薄饼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：semolina pancake、honey、butter。
description.nl: Baghrir blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: semolina pancake, honey, butter.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for a gentle honeyed breakfast sweet; skip if you want savory or crisp food.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃温和蜂蜜早餐甜点时适合；想吃咸味或酥脆口感则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor een zachte honingzoete ontbijtoptie; vermijd als je hartig of krokant wilt.

shortDescription.en: Round Moroccan bread used for scooping tagines, salads, dips, and stews.
shortDescription.zh: 圆形摩洛哥面包，常用来蘸塔吉锅、沙拉、蘸酱和炖菜。
shortDescription.nl: Rond Marokkaans brood om tajines, salades, dips en stoofgerechten mee te scheppen.

cookingProfile.en: A staple side bread with a chewy crust and soft interior.
cookingProfile.zh: 是基础配面包，外皮有嚼劲，内部柔软。
cookingProfile.nl: Een basisbrood met taaie korst en zachte binnenkant.

description.en: Khobz is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: wheat bread, semolina, sesame.
description.zh: 摩洛哥圆面包 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：wheat bread、semolina、sesame。
description.nl: Khobz blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: wheat bread, semolina, sesame.

orderVerdict.en: Order it to scoop sauces and stews; skip if you are looking for a dish by itself.
orderVerdict.zh: 适合用来蘸酱汁和炖菜；如果想点一道独立菜，它不够。
orderVerdict.nl: Bestel om sauzen en stoof te scheppen; sla over als je een zelfstandig gerecht zoekt.

shortDescription.en: Sardines marinated with chermoula herbs, garlic, cumin, lemon, and paprika, then grilled or fried.
shortDescription.zh: 沙丁鱼用 chermoula 香草蒜孜然柠檬红椒腌过后烤或炸。
shortDescription.nl: Sardines gemarineerd met chermoula, knoflook, komijn, citroen en paprika, daarna gegrild of gebakken.

cookingProfile.en: Expect bold oily fish with herb-lemon spice, not a mild white fish fillet.
cookingProfile.zh: 会是味道明显的油脂感鱼，带香草柠檬香料，不是温和白鱼柳。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht uitgesproken vette vis met kruid-citroen-specerij, geen milde witte visfilet.

description.en: Sardines Chermoula is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: sardines, chermoula, lemon.
description.zh: 香草腌沙丁鱼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：sardines、chermoula、lemon。
description.nl: Sardines chermoula blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: sardines, chermoula, lemon.

orderVerdict.en: Great if you like bold oily fish; skip if you prefer mild boneless fillets.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢味道明显的油脂鱼很适合；偏好温和无刺鱼柳则不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als je stevige vette vis lekker vindt; vermijd als je milde graatloze filets zoekt.

shortDescription.en: Moroccan fish cooked in a tagine-style sauce with vegetables, chermoula, preserved lemon, and olives.
shortDescription.zh: 摩洛哥塔吉风格炖鱼，配蔬菜、chermoula、腌柠檬和橄榄。
shortDescription.nl: Marokkaanse vis in tajine-stijl met groente, chermoula, ingelegde citroen en olijven.

cookingProfile.en: Served hot and saucy, with tender fish absorbing herb-citrus flavors.
cookingProfile.zh: 热的带汁鱼菜，鱼肉会吸收香草柑橘风味。
cookingProfile.nl: Warm en sausachtig, met zachte vis die kruid-citrussmaak opneemt.

description.en: Fish Tagine is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: chermoula, preserved lemon, olives.
description.zh: 摩洛哥鱼塔吉锅 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：chermoula、preserved lemon、olives。
description.nl: Vistagine blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: chermoula, preserved lemon, olives.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a saucy fish dish with citrus and olives; skip if you want crisp fried seafood.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃带柑橘和橄榄的酱汁鱼菜时适合；想吃酥炸海鲜则不对。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor sausachtige vis met citrus en olijven; sla over als je krokant gefrituurde zeevruchten wilt.

shortDescription.en: Sweet-savory Moroccan pie with spiced chicken, eggs, almonds, crisp pastry, cinnamon, and powdered sugar.
shortDescription.zh: 摩洛哥甜咸鸡肉派，含香料鸡肉、鸡蛋、杏仁、酥皮、肉桂和糖粉。
shortDescription.nl: Zoet-hartige Marokkaanse pastei met kruidige kip, ei, amandel, krokant deeg, kaneel en poedersuiker.

cookingProfile.en: It is flaky and aromatic, with sweetness on a savory chicken filling.
cookingProfile.zh: 口感酥脆香料感强，咸鸡肉馅上会有明显甜味。
cookingProfile.nl: Vlokkig en aromatisch, met zoetheid bovenop hartige kipvulling.

description.en: Chicken Bastilla is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: cinnamon sugar, almonds, spiced chicken.
description.zh: 鸡肉酥皮派 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：cinnamon sugar、almonds、spiced chicken。
description.nl: Kipbastilla blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: cinnamon sugar, almonds, spiced chicken.

orderVerdict.en: Memorable if you like sweet-savory pastry; avoid with nut allergy or if sugar on chicken sounds wrong.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢甜咸酥皮会很有记忆点；坚果过敏或不能接受鸡肉配糖粉则不要点。
orderVerdict.nl: Bijzonder als je zoet-hartige pastei waardeert; vermijd bij notenallergie of als suiker op kip vreemd klinkt.

shortDescription.en: Small fried pastry triangles filled with almond paste and scented with honey and orange blossom water.
shortDescription.zh: 小三角炸酥皮，内馅是杏仁膏，带蜂蜜和橙花水香。
shortDescription.nl: Kleine gefrituurde driehoekjes met amandelvulling, honing en oranjebloesemwater.

cookingProfile.en: Sticky, crisp, and nutty, often served as a sweet pastry rather than a plated dessert.
cookingProfile.zh: 粘甜、酥脆、坚果香，通常是甜点心而非盘装甜品。
cookingProfile.nl: Kleverig, krokant en nootachtig, meer zoet gebakje dan borddessert.

description.en: Almond Briouat is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: almond paste, honey, orange blossom water.
description.zh: 杏仁三角酥 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：almond paste、honey、orange blossom water。
description.nl: Amandelbriouat blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: almond paste, honey, orange blossom water.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for a crisp honeyed almond pastry; skip with nut allergy or if floral sweets are too much.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃蜂蜜杏仁酥点时适合；坚果过敏或不喜欢花香甜点则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies voor krokant honing-amandelgebak; vermijd bij notenallergie of als bloemige zoetheid te veel is.

shortDescription.en: Flower-shaped Moroccan fried sesame pastry soaked in honey and scented with anise or orange blossom.
shortDescription.zh: 花形摩洛哥芝麻炸点心，浸蜂蜜，常带茴香或橙花香。
shortDescription.nl: Bloemvormig Marokkaans sesamgebak, gefrituurd en in honing gedrenkt met anijs of oranjebloesem.

cookingProfile.en: Very sweet, sticky, and chewy-crisp, usually eaten in small pieces.
cookingProfile.zh: 非常甜且粘，外脆内韧，通常少量吃。
cookingProfile.nl: Zeer zoet, kleverig en krokant-taai, meestal in kleine stukjes gegeten.

description.en: Chebakia is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: honey, sesame, orange blossom.
description.zh: 蜂蜜芝麻花结 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：honey、sesame、orange blossom。
description.nl: Chebakia blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: honey, sesame, orange blossom.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a very sweet honey-sesame pastry; skip if you prefer light or low-sugar desserts.
orderVerdict.zh: 适合想吃很甜的蜂蜜芝麻点心；偏好清淡低甜甜点就不要点。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor heel zoet honing-sesamgebak; vermijd als je lichte of minder zoete desserts wilt.

shortDescription.en: Coiled Moroccan pastry filled with almond paste, usually scented with cinnamon and orange blossom water.
shortDescription.zh: 盘蛇形摩洛哥杏仁酥皮，常有肉桂和橙花水香。
shortDescription.nl: Opgerolde Marokkaanse amandelpastei met kaneel en oranjebloesemwater.

cookingProfile.en: It eats like a crisp almond pastry, not a soft cake.
cookingProfile.zh: 吃起来是酥脆杏仁点心，不是松软蛋糕。
cookingProfile.nl: Het eet als krokant amandelgebak, niet als zachte cake.

description.en: M’hanncha is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: almond paste, cinnamon, orange blossom.
description.zh: 蛇形杏仁酥 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：almond paste、cinnamon、orange blossom。
description.nl: M’hanncha blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: almond paste, cinnamon, orange blossom.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for almond-forward pastry; skip if nuts or floral aromas are not welcome.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃杏仁主导的酥点时适合；不吃坚果或不喜欢花香则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor amandelrijk gebak; vermijd als noten of bloemige aroma's niet welkom zijn.

shortDescription.en: Dense Moroccan sweet made from toasted flour, sesame, almonds, honey, butter, and warm spices.
shortDescription.zh: 摩洛哥浓厚甜点，由炒面粉、芝麻、杏仁、蜂蜜、黄油和暖香料制成。
shortDescription.nl: Dichte Marokkaanse zoetigheid van geroosterd meel, sesam, amandel, honing, boter en warme specerijen.

cookingProfile.en: It is crumbly, nutty, and very rich, usually eaten in small spoonfuls.
cookingProfile.zh: 口感松散粉糯、坚果香且很厚重，通常少量吃。
cookingProfile.nl: Kruimelig, nootachtig en heel rijk, meestal in kleine lepeltjes gegeten.

description.en: Sellou is kept as a verified moroccan reference because its ordering cues are specific: toasted flour, sesame, almonds.
description.zh: 摩洛哥坚果芝麻甜粉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：toasted flour、sesame、almonds。
description.nl: Sellou blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: toasted flour, sesame, almonds.

orderVerdict.en: A rich nutty sweet for small portions; skip if you want a juicy or light dessert.
orderVerdict.zh: 适合少量品尝的浓郁坚果甜点；想要多汁或清爽甜点则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Een rijke nootachtige zoetigheid voor kleine porties; vermijd als je sappig of licht dessert wilt.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese chicken curry with masala spices, often served with rice, roti, potato, and long beans.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南咖喱鸡，使用 masala 香料，常配米饭、roti、土豆和长豇豆。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaamse kipkerrie met masalakruiden, vaak met rijst, roti, aardappel en kousenband.

cookingProfile.en: Expect warm curry spice and tender chicken rather than a Thai-style coconut curry.
cookingProfile.zh: 会是暖香料咖喱鸡，不是泰式椰奶咖喱。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht warme kerriekruiden en malse kip, geen Thaise kokos-curry.

description.en: Kip Kerrie is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: Surinamese masala, chicken, potato.
description.zh: 苏里南咖喱鸡 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：Surinamese masala、chicken、potato。
description.nl: Kip kerrie blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: Surinamese masala, chicken, potato.

orderVerdict.en: A dependable Surinamese curry choice; ask about Madame Jeanette heat if sensitive to spice.
orderVerdict.zh: 这是很稳的苏里南咖喱选择；怕辣要先问是否加黄灯笼椒。
orderVerdict.nl: Een betrouwbare Surinaamse curry; vraag naar Madame Jeanette als je gevoelig bent voor pittigheid.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese brown beans with rice, often cooked with meat, tomato, spice, and a slightly sweet-savory sauce.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南棕豆饭，常和肉、番茄、香料一起煮，味道甜咸浓郁。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaamse bruine bonen met rijst, vaak met vlees, tomaat, specerijen en licht zoet-hartige saus.

cookingProfile.en: A hearty bean-and-rice plate, softer and saucier than plain rice with beans.
cookingProfile.zh: 这是有饱腹感的豆饭盘，比普通豆配饭更软更多汁。
cookingProfile.nl: Een stevig bonen-rijstbord, zachter en sausachtiger dan gewone bonen met rijst.

description.en: Bruine Bonen met Rijst is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: brown beans, rice, ketjap manis.
description.zh: 红豆米饭 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：brown beans、rice、ketjap manis。
description.nl: Bruine bonen met rijst blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: brown beans, rice, ketjap manis.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a filling bean-and-rice meal; ask if pork is used if you avoid it.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃饱腹豆饭很适合；不吃猪肉要先问是否加肉。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een vullende bonen-rijstmaaltijd; vraag naar varkensvlees als je dat vermijdt.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese chicken pot pie with a pastry crust, creamy chicken filling, vegetables, and sometimes egg.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南鸡肉派，酥皮里是奶油感鸡肉馅、蔬菜，有时有鸡蛋。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaamse kippastei met deegkorst, romige kipvulling, groente en soms ei.

cookingProfile.en: Served as a baked pie portion with soft savory filling under pastry.
cookingProfile.zh: 以烤派形式上桌，酥皮下是柔软咸香馅料。
cookingProfile.nl: Geserveerd als gebakken pasteiportie met zachte hartige vulling onder deeg.

description.en: Surinamese Pastei is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: pastry crust, chicken filling, creamy sauce.
description.zh: 苏里南鸡肉派 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：pastry crust、chicken filling、creamy sauce。
description.nl: Surinaamse pastei blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: pastry crust, chicken filling, creamy sauce.

orderVerdict.en: A friendly comfort choice if you like chicken pie; avoid with gluten, dairy, or egg concerns.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢鸡肉派会很稳；麸质、奶制品或鸡蛋过敏要避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Een toegankelijke comfortkeuze als je kippastei lust; vermijd bij gluten, zuivel of ei.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese duck curry, usually made with masala, pepper, and a rich sauce served with rice or roti.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南鸭肉咖喱，通常有 masala、辣椒和浓郁酱汁，配米饭或 roti。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaamse eendencurry met masala, peper en rijke saus, geserveerd met rijst of roti.

cookingProfile.en: Richer and gamier than chicken curry, with tender duck pieces in curry sauce.
cookingProfile.zh: 比鸡肉咖喱更浓郁更有禽类风味，鸭肉块浸在咖喱汁里。
cookingProfile.nl: Rijker en wildachtiger dan kipkerrie, met zachte eend in currysaus.

description.en: Doksa is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: duck, masala curry, Madame Jeanette.
description.zh: 苏里南鸭肉咖喱 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：duck、masala curry、Madame Jeanette。
description.nl: Doksa blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: duck, masala curry, Madame Jeanette.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for a richer duck curry; skip if you prefer mild chicken or lean meat.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃更浓郁的鸭肉咖喱时适合；偏好温和鸡肉或瘦肉则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor rijkere eendencurry; vermijd als je milde kip of mager vlees wilt.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese boiled root-vegetable plate often served with salt cod, plantain, cassava, sweet potato, and egg.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南根茎拼盘，常配盐鳕鱼、大蕉、木薯、红薯和鸡蛋。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaams bord met gekookte knollen, vaak met bakkeljauw, bakbanaan, cassave, zoete aardappel en ei.

cookingProfile.en: Expect a plain-looking but hearty plate of boiled starches with salty fish contrast.
cookingProfile.zh: 外观看起来朴实，但很有饱腹感，根茎淀粉配咸鱼形成对比。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht een eenvoudig maar stevig bord gekookte zetmelen met zoute vis als contrast.

description.en: Herheri is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: salt cod, boiled roots, plantain.
description.zh: 苏里南根茎鱼盘 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：salt cod、boiled roots、plantain。
description.nl: Herheri blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: salt cod, boiled roots, plantain.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a traditional filling plate; skip if salty fish or boiled starches do not appeal.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃传统饱腹拼盘时适合；不喜欢咸鱼或水煮根茎则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een traditioneel vullend bord; vermijd als zoute vis of gekookte zetmelen niet aanspreken.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese peppery fish soup, usually spicy and aromatic with fish, herbs, and Madame Jeanette chili.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南胡椒鱼汤，通常用鱼、香草和黄灯笼椒，辛香偏辣。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaamse peperige vissoep, meestal pittig en aromatisch met vis, kruiden en Madame Jeanette.

cookingProfile.en: A hot broth soup with strong pepper aroma, not a creamy seafood chowder.
cookingProfile.zh: 是热汤底，胡椒和辣椒香明显，不是奶油海鲜浓汤。
cookingProfile.nl: Een hete bouillonsoep met duidelijke pepergeur, geen romige zeevruchtensoep.

description.en: Pepre Watra is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: fish broth, Madame Jeanette, lime.
description.zh: 苏里南辣鱼汤 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：fish broth、Madame Jeanette、lime。
description.nl: Pepre watra blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: fish broth, Madame Jeanette, lime.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it if you want a spicy fish soup; skip if pepper heat or fish broth is a concern.
orderVerdict.zh: 想喝偏辣鱼汤时适合；怕辣或不喜欢鱼汤则不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit als je pittige vissoep wilt; vermijd bij peperhitte of als visbouillon niet trekt.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese-Javanese mixed vegetable salad with spiced grated coconut dressing.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南爪哇风格混合蔬菜沙拉，拌香料椰丝酱。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaams-Javaanse groentesalade met gekruide geraspte kokos.

cookingProfile.en: Usually served cool or room temperature, with crunchy vegetables and dry coconut seasoning.
cookingProfile.zh: 通常冷食或常温，蔬菜有脆感，椰丝调味偏干香。
cookingProfile.nl: Meestal koel of op kamertemperatuur, met knapperige groente en droge kokoskruiding.

description.en: Goedangan is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: spiced coconut, blanched vegetables, chili.
description.zh: 苏里南椰丝蔬菜沙拉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：spiced coconut、blanched vegetables、chili。
description.nl: Goedangan blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: spiced coconut, blanched vegetables, chili.

orderVerdict.en: A good vegetable side if you like coconut; skip if you want a hot saucy dish.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢椰香蔬菜配菜时适合；想吃热的带汁主菜则不够。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als groentebijgerecht met kokos; sla over als je een warm sausgerecht wilt.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese-Javanese vegetable salad with peanut sauce, related to Indonesian pecel.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南爪哇风格蔬菜沙拉，配花生酱，类似印尼 pecel。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaams-Javaanse groentesalade met pindasaus, verwant aan Indonesische pecel.

cookingProfile.en: Cool vegetables meet a thick peanut sauce, so it is nutty and saucy rather than leafy-light.
cookingProfile.zh: 冷蔬菜配厚花生酱，坚果感和酱汁感明显，不是单纯清爽叶菜。
cookingProfile.nl: Koele groente met dikke pindasaus, dus nootachtig en sausachtig in plaats van heel licht.

description.en: Pitjel is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: peanut sauce, blanched vegetables, bean sprouts.
description.zh: 苏里南花生蔬菜 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：peanut sauce、blanched vegetables、bean sprouts。
description.nl: Pitjel blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: peanut sauce, blanched vegetables, bean sprouts.

orderVerdict.en: Good if you like peanut sauce with vegetables; avoid completely with peanut allergy.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢花生酱配蔬菜时适合；花生过敏必须避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als je pindasaus met groente lekker vindt; volledig vermijden bij pinda-allergie.

shortDescription.en: Fried ripe plantain, often served with peanut sauce in Surinamese snack shops.
shortDescription.zh: 炸熟大蕉，苏里南小吃店常配花生酱。
shortDescription.nl: Gefrituurde rijpe bakbanaan, vaak met pindasaus in Surinaamse snackbars.

cookingProfile.en: Sweet, soft plantain in a crisp batter or fried edge, usually eaten as a snack.
cookingProfile.zh: 甜软大蕉带酥脆外层或焦边，通常当小食吃。
cookingProfile.nl: Zoete zachte bakbanaan met krokant beslag of rand, meestal als snack.

description.en: Bakabana is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: ripe plantain, fried batter, peanut sauce.
description.zh: 炸香蕉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：ripe plantain、fried batter、peanut sauce。
description.nl: Bakabana blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: ripe plantain, fried batter, peanut sauce.

orderVerdict.en: Great for a sweet fried snack; avoid with peanut allergy if served with peanut sauce.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃甜口炸小食很适合；若配花生酱，花生过敏要避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een zoete gefrituurde snack; vermijd bij pinda-allergie als er pindasaus bij zit.

shortDescription.en: Sweet Surinamese-Javanese coconut drink or dessert with green jelly, syrup, and milk or coconut milk.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南爪哇风格甜饮/甜品，含绿色粉冻、糖浆、牛奶或椰奶。
shortDescription.nl: Zoete Surinaams-Javaanse drank of dessert met groene gelei, siroop en melk of kokosmelk.

cookingProfile.en: Served cold and spoonable or drinkable, closer to a sweet iced dessert than a solid dish.
cookingProfile.zh: 冷食，可喝也可用勺吃，更像冰甜品而不是固体菜。
cookingProfile.nl: Koud geserveerd, lepelbaar of drinkbaar, meer ijsdessert dan vast gerecht.

description.en: Dawet is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: green jelly, coconut milk, palm sugar syrup.
description.zh: 苏里南椰奶饮甜品 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：green jelly、coconut milk、palm sugar syrup。
description.nl: Dawet blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: green jelly, coconut milk, palm sugar syrup.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it as a cold sweet drink-dessert; skip if you want a baked or solid dessert.
orderVerdict.zh: 想要冰凉甜饮型甜品时适合；想吃烘焙或固体甜点则不对。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit als koude zoete drank-dessert; sla over als je gebakken of vast dessert wilt.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese layered sweet bread or cake with raisins, cinnamon, and often a rich buttery dough.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南分层甜面包/蛋糕，常有葡萄干、肉桂和较浓郁的黄油面团。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaams gelaagd zoet brood of cake met rozijnen, kaneel en vaak rijk boterdeeg.

cookingProfile.en: More like a dense festive sweet bread than a light sponge cake.
cookingProfile.zh: 更像厚实节庆甜面包，不是轻盈海绵蛋糕。
cookingProfile.nl: Meer een dicht feestelijk zoetbrood dan een luchtige cake.

description.en: Fiadoe is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: raisins, cinnamon, buttery dough.
description.zh: 苏里南甜面包卷 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：raisins、cinnamon、buttery dough。
description.nl: Fiadoe blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: raisins, cinnamon, buttery dough.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a dense raisin-cinnamon sweet bread; skip if you want a light creamy dessert.
orderVerdict.zh: 适合想吃厚实葡萄干肉桂甜面包；想要轻盈奶油甜点则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor dicht rozijn-kaneelzoetbrood; vermijd als je een licht romig dessert zoekt.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese cornstarch cookies that are pale, crumbly, and melt-in-the-mouth.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南玉米淀粉小饼干，颜色浅，松散入口即化。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaamse maizenakoekjes: bleek, kruimelig en smeltend in de mond.

cookingProfile.en: Served as small cookies, usually dry and delicate rather than creamy.
cookingProfile.zh: 小饼干形式，通常偏干且细腻，不是奶油甜品。
cookingProfile.nl: Als kleine koekjes, meestal droog en fijn, niet romig.

description.en: Maizena Koekjes is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: cornstarch, butter, vanilla.
description.zh: 玉米淀粉小饼干 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：cornstarch、butter、vanilla。
description.nl: Maïzena koekjes blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: cornstarch, butter, vanilla.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for a delicate crumbly cookie; skip if you want a moist dessert.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃细腻松散小饼干时适合；想要湿润甜点则不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor een fijn kruimelig koekje; sla over als je een vochtig dessert wilt.

shortDescription.en: Fried cassava served with sautéed salt cod, often spicy with pepper and onion.
shortDescription.zh: 炸木薯配炒盐鳕鱼，常有辣椒和洋葱，咸香明显。
shortDescription.nl: Gefrituurde cassave met gebakken bakkeljauw, vaak pittig met peper en ui.

cookingProfile.en: The contrast is crisp starchy cassava with salty shredded fish.
cookingProfile.zh: 重点是酥脆淀粉感木薯配咸香鱼丝。
cookingProfile.nl: Het contrast is krokante zetmeelrijke cassave met zoute visvlokken.

description.en: Telo Bakkeljauw is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: fried cassava, salt cod, Madame Jeanette.
description.zh: 炸木薯配咸鱼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：fried cassava、salt cod、Madame Jeanette。
description.nl: Telo bakkeljauw blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: fried cassava, salt cod, Madame Jeanette.

orderVerdict.en: A strong snack if you like salty fish and fried cassava; skip if salt cod sounds too intense.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢咸鱼和炸木薯会很对味；觉得盐鳕鱼太重口则不推荐。
orderVerdict.nl: Een stevige snack als je zoute vis en gefrituurde cassave lust; vermijd als bakkeljauw te intens klinkt.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese chicken satay skewers with peanut sauce, often sweeter and spicier than plain grilled chicken.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南鸡肉沙嗲串配花生酱，通常比普通烤鸡更甜、更香辣。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaamse kipsate met pindasaus, vaak zoeter en pittiger dan gewone gegrilde kip.

cookingProfile.en: Served hot on skewers with a thick peanut sauce.
cookingProfile.zh: 热串上桌，配厚花生酱。
cookingProfile.nl: Warm aan spiesjes met dikke pindasaus.

description.en: Surinamese Kip Saté is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: peanut sauce, grilled chicken, ketjap manis.
description.zh: 苏里南鸡肉沙爹 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：peanut sauce、grilled chicken、ketjap manis。
description.nl: Surinaamse kip saté blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: peanut sauce, grilled chicken, ketjap manis.

orderVerdict.en: A friendly grilled choice if peanut sauce is okay; avoid completely with peanut allergy.
orderVerdict.zh: 能吃花生酱的话是友好的烤串选择；花生过敏必须避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Een toegankelijke grillkeuze als pindasaus kan; volledig vermijden bij pinda-allergie.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese-Chinese style char siu pork, sweet-red glazed and often served with rice or noodles.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南中式叉烧猪肉，红色甜咸酱烤，常配米饭或面。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaams-Chinese cha siu van varkensvlees, rood zoet-hartig geglazuurd, vaak met rijst of noedels.

cookingProfile.en: Expect sweet glazed pork slices, not smoky barbecue ribs.
cookingProfile.zh: 会是甜咸酱汁猪肉片，不是烟熏烤肋排。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht zoet geglazuurde varkensplakken, geen rokerige spareribs.

description.en: Surinamese Cha Siu is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: char siu glaze, roast pork, soy sweetness.
description.zh: 苏里南叉烧 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：char siu glaze、roast pork、soy sweetness。
description.nl: Surinaamse cha siu blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: char siu glaze, roast pork, soy sweetness.

orderVerdict.en: Good if you like sweet glazed pork; skip if you avoid pork or sweet meat.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢甜咸叉烧猪肉时适合；不吃猪肉或不喜欢甜肉则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als je zoet geglazuurd varkensvlees lust; vermijd bij geen varken of zoet vlees.

names.zh: 苏里南 Pom 三明治

shortDescription.en: A Surinamese sandwich filled with pom, the citrusy baked tayer-and-chicken casserole.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南 pom 三明治，夹的是带柑橘酸香的 tayer 鸡肉烤菜。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaams broodje met pom, de citrusachtige ovenschotel van pomtajer en kip.

cookingProfile.en: The filling is soft, tangy, and savory inside a bread roll.
cookingProfile.zh: 馅料柔软、酸香、咸鲜，夹在面包里。
cookingProfile.nl: De vulling is zacht, friszuur en hartig in een broodje.

description.en: Broodje Pom is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: pom filling, tayer, chicken.
description.zh: 苏里南 Pom 三明治 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：pom filling、tayer、chicken。
description.nl: Broodje pom blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: pom filling, tayer, chicken.

orderVerdict.en: A classic Surinamese sandwich if you like tangy soft fillings; skip if you want a dry crisp roll.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢酸香柔软馅料时这是经典苏里南三明治；想要干爽脆口面包则不适合。
orderVerdict.nl: Een klassiek Surinaams broodje als je zachte frisse vulling lust; vermijd als je een droog krokant broodje wilt.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese roti plate with chicken curry, potato, long beans, egg, and soft roti flatbread.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南 roti 咖喱鸡盘，含咖喱鸡、土豆、长豇豆、鸡蛋和软 roti 饼。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaamse roti met kipkerrie, aardappel, kousenband, ei en zachte rotiplaat.

cookingProfile.en: A full meal where the roti is used to scoop curry rather than a small wrap.
cookingProfile.zh: 这是完整一餐，roti 用来蘸咖喱，不是小卷饼。
cookingProfile.nl: Een volledige maaltijd waarbij de roti curry opschept, geen kleine wrap.

description.en: Roti Kip Kerrie is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: roti, chicken curry, potato.
description.zh: 咖喱鸡薄饼套餐 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：roti、chicken curry、potato。
description.nl: Roti kip kerrie blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: roti, chicken curry, potato.

orderVerdict.en: One of the strongest Surinamese first choices; skip if you need gluten-free or very light food.
orderVerdict.zh: 这是最稳的苏里南首选之一；需要无麸质或想吃很轻的人不适合。
orderVerdict.nl: Een van de sterkste Surinaamse eerste keuzes; vermijd bij glutenvrij of als je heel licht wilt eten.

shortDescription.en: Surinamese fried rice with mixed roasted meats, often including chicken, pork, char siu, or other moksi meti meats.
shortDescription.zh: 苏里南炒饭配混合烤肉，常有鸡肉、猪肉、叉烧或其他 moksi meti 肉类。
shortDescription.nl: Surinaamse nasi met gemengd geroosterd vlees, vaak kip, varken, cha siu of ander moksi meti vlees.

cookingProfile.en: Expect a hearty rice plate with sweet-savory roasted meat rather than plain vegetable fried rice.
cookingProfile.zh: 会是有饱腹感的肉类炒饭，不是普通蔬菜炒饭。
cookingProfile.nl: Verwacht een stevig rijstbord met zoet-hartig geroosterd vlees, geen gewone groenterijst.

description.en: Nasi Moksi Meti is kept as a verified surinamese reference because its ordering cues are specific: fried rice, moksi meti meats, ketjap manis.
description.zh: 混肉炒饭 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：fried rice、moksi meti meats、ketjap manis。
description.nl: Nasi moksi meti blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: fried rice, moksi meti meats, ketjap manis.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a filling mixed-meat rice plate; ask about the meats if avoiding pork.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃饱腹混合肉炒饭很适合；不吃猪肉要先问肉类组成。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een vullend rijstbord met gemengd vlees; vraag naar het vlees als je varken vermijdt.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian potato stew with ají amarillo, cheese, milk, herbs, and sometimes vegetables.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁土豆炖菜，带黄辣椒、奶酪、牛奶、香草，有时加蔬菜。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse aardappelstoof met ají amarillo, kaas, melk, kruiden en soms groente.

cookingProfile.en: Creamy and potato-forward, not the Colombian chicken-corn soup also called ajiaco.
cookingProfile.zh: 奶香土豆感明显，不是哥伦比亚同名鸡肉玉米汤。
cookingProfile.nl: Romig en aardappelgericht, niet de Colombiaanse kip-maïssoep die ook ajiaco heet.

description.en: Ajiaco is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: ají amarillo, potato, cheese.
description.zh: 秘鲁土豆奶酪炖菜 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：ají amarillo、potato、cheese。
description.nl: Ajiaco blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: ají amarillo, potato, cheese.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a creamy potato stew; skip if you expected the Colombian soup version.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃奶香土豆炖菜时适合；如果你期待哥伦比亚汤版，要注意这不是同一类。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor romige aardappelstoof; sla over als je de Colombiaanse soepvariant verwacht.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian beef stew braised with cilantro, beer or chicha, ají, and served with rice and beans.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁香菜炖牛肉，常用啤酒或 chicha、辣椒炖制，配米饭和豆。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse rundstoof met koriander, bier of chicha, ají, geserveerd met rijst en bonen.

cookingProfile.en: The green cilantro sauce and tender beef are the main cues.
cookingProfile.zh: 主要识别点是绿色香菜酱汁和软烂牛肉。
cookingProfile.nl: De groene koriandersaus en mals rundvlees zijn de hoofdkenmerken.

description.en: Seco de Res is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: cilantro sauce, braised beef, ají amarillo.
description.zh: 秘鲁香菜炖牛肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：cilantro sauce、braised beef、ají amarillo。
description.nl: Seco de res blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: cilantro sauce, braised beef, ají amarillo.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for tender beef in herbal green sauce; skip if cilantro tastes unpleasant to you.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢香菜绿酱炖牛肉时适合；如果很讨厌香菜就不要点。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor mals rund in groene kruidensaus; vermijd als koriander voor jou onaangenaam smaakt.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian lamb stew braised with cilantro, ají, beer or chicha, and served with rice or beans.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁香菜炖羊肉，配黄辣椒、啤酒或 chicha，常配米饭或豆。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse lamsstoof met koriander, ají, bier of chicha, vaak met rijst of bonen.

cookingProfile.en: Richer and more gamey than seco de res, with the same green herbal sauce profile.
cookingProfile.zh: 比牛肉版本更浓郁更有羊肉风味，但同样是绿色香草酱汁。
cookingProfile.nl: Rijker en wilder dan seco de res, met hetzelfde groene kruidenprofiel.

description.en: Seco de Cordero is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: lamb, cilantro sauce, ají panca.
description.zh: 秘鲁香菜炖羊肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：lamb、cilantro sauce、ají panca。
description.nl: Seco de cordero blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: lamb, cilantro sauce, ají panca.

orderVerdict.en: Good if you like lamb and herbal stews; skip if lamb flavor is too strong for you.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢羊肉和香草炖菜时适合；不喜欢羊肉味则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als je lamsvlees en kruidige stoof lust; vermijd als lamssmaak te sterk is.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian pan-fried rice-and-bean cake, often served with steak, seafood, egg, or sauce.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁米饭豆泥煎饼，常配牛排、海鲜、鸡蛋或酱汁。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse gebakken rijst-bonenkoek, vaak met biefstuk, zeevruchten, ei of saus.

cookingProfile.en: The base is crisp outside and soft inside, made from rice and beans rather than potato.
cookingProfile.zh: 底部外煎脆、内软，由米饭和豆制成，不是土豆饼。
cookingProfile.nl: De basis is krokant buiten en zacht binnen, gemaakt van rijst en bonen, niet aardappel.

description.en: Tacu Tacu is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: fried rice-bean cake, ají sauce, onion.
description.zh: 秘鲁豆饭煎饼 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：fried rice-bean cake、ají sauce、onion。
description.nl: Tacu tacu blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: fried rice-bean cake, ají sauce, onion.

orderVerdict.en: Great if you want a filling rice-and-bean base; skip if you dislike dense starches.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃米豆类饱腹主食时很合适；不喜欢厚重淀粉则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een vullende rijst-bonenbasis; vermijd als dichte zetmelen je niet liggen.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian seafood rice colored with ají and often packed with shrimp, squid, mussels, and fish.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁海鲜饭，用辣椒调色调味，常有虾、鱿鱼、贻贝和鱼。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse zeevruchtenrijst met ají, vaak met garnaal, inktvis, mosselen en vis.

cookingProfile.en: It is a saucy seafood rice dish, not Spanish paella though it may look related.
cookingProfile.zh: 这是带汁的秘鲁海鲜饭，不是西班牙 paella，虽然外观可能相似。
cookingProfile.nl: Een sausachtige Peruaanse zeevruchtenrijst, geen Spaanse paella al lijkt het verwant.

description.en: Arroz con Mariscos is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: seafood, ají amarillo, cilantro.
description.zh: 秘鲁海鲜饭 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：seafood、ají amarillo、cilantro。
description.nl: Arroz con mariscos blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: seafood, ají amarillo, cilantro.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a briny seafood rice plate; avoid with shellfish or fish allergy.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃咸鲜海味饭很适合；甲壳类或鱼类过敏要避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor een zilte zeevruchtenrijst; vermijd bij schaal- of visallergie.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian fried seafood platter, usually fish and shellfish with onion salsa, lime, and fried cassava or corn.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁炸海鲜拼盘，常有鱼和贝/虾类，配洋葱莎莎、青柠、炸木薯或玉米。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse gefrituurde zeevruchtenschotel met vis en schaaldieren, uiensalsa, limoen en cassave of mais.

cookingProfile.en: Crisp fried seafood with bright onion-lime topping, not a jelly dessert despite the name.
cookingProfile.zh: 是酥炸海鲜配洋葱青柠，不是果冻甜点。
cookingProfile.nl: Krokante gefrituurde zeevruchten met ui-limoen, geen gelei-dessert ondanks de naam.

description.en: Jalea is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: fried seafood, salsa criolla, lime.
description.zh: 秘鲁炸海鲜拼盘 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：fried seafood、salsa criolla、lime。
description.nl: Jalea blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: fried seafood, salsa criolla, lime.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for a crispy seafood platter; skip if you expected something light or raw.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃酥炸海鲜拼盘时适合；如果想要清淡或生鲜风味则不对。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor een krokante zeevruchtenschotel; sla over als je iets lichts of rauws verwacht.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian mussels served on the half shell with onion, tomato, corn, cilantro, chili, and lime.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁半壳贻贝，铺洋葱、番茄、玉米、香菜、辣椒和青柠。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse mosselen op de halve schelp met ui, tomaat, mais, koriander, chili en limoen.

cookingProfile.en: Usually chilled or cool, with fresh salsa over cooked mussels.
cookingProfile.zh: 通常冷食或微凉，熟贻贝上铺清爽莎莎。
cookingProfile.nl: Meestal koel, met frisse salsa over gare mosselen.

description.en: Choritos a la Chalaca is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: mussels, lime, onion salsa.
description.zh: 秘鲁贻贝沙拉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：mussels、lime、onion salsa。
description.nl: Choritos a la chalaca blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: mussels, lime, onion salsa.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a bright shellfish starter; avoid with shellfish allergy or if cold mussels sound unpleasant.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃清爽贝类前菜时适合；甲壳/贝类过敏或不喜欢冷贻贝则避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als frisse schelpdierstarter; vermijd bij schaal-/schelpdierallergie of als koude mosselen niet trekken.

shortDescription.en: The citrusy, spicy ceviche marinade served as a small drink or seafood shot, often with fish or shellfish notes.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁 ceviche 的酸辣腌汁，常作为小杯饮/海鲜 shot，上面可能带鱼或贝类风味。
shortDescription.nl: De citrus-pittige ceviche-marinade als klein drankje of zeevruchtenshot, vaak met vis- of schaaldiernoten.

cookingProfile.en: It is a sharp cold liquid, not milk despite the name.
cookingProfile.zh: 它是酸辣冷汁，并不是牛奶。
cookingProfile.nl: Het is een scherp koud sap, geen melk ondanks de naam.

description.en: Leche de Tigre is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: lime, raw fish marinade, ají amarillo.
description.zh: 虎奶酸辣海鲜汁 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：lime、raw fish marinade、ají amarillo。
description.nl: Leche de tigre blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: lime, raw fish marinade, ají amarillo.

orderVerdict.en: Only choose it if you like sharp ceviche juice; skip if raw seafood or sour intensity worries you.
orderVerdict.zh: 只有喜欢 ceviche 酸辣汁时才点；介意生海鲜或强酸味就跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies alleen als je scherpe cevichejus lekker vindt; vermijd bij rauwe zeevruchten of veel zuur.

shortDescription.en: Chilled Peruvian mashed potato terrine seasoned with lime and ají amarillo, layered with chicken, tuna, or avocado.
shortDescription.zh: 冷食秘鲁土豆泥千层，用青柠和黄辣椒调味，中间夹鸡肉、金枪鱼或牛油果。
shortDescription.nl: Koude Peruaanse aardappelterrine met limoen en ají amarillo, gevuld met kip, tonijn of avocado.

cookingProfile.en: Served cool and soft, with tangy yellow potato layers rather than hot mashed potatoes.
cookingProfile.zh: 冷食柔软，重点是酸香黄色土豆层，不是热土豆泥。
cookingProfile.nl: Koel en zacht geserveerd, met frisse gele aardappellagen, geen warme puree.

description.en: Causa Limeña is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: lime potato, ají amarillo, chicken or avocado.
description.zh: 利马土豆冷盘 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：lime potato、ají amarillo、chicken or avocado。
description.nl: Causa limeña blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: lime potato, ají amarillo, chicken or avocado.

orderVerdict.en: A friendly cold starter if you like potato salad textures; skip if you want something hot.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢土豆沙拉口感的话是友好的冷前菜；想吃热菜则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Een toegankelijke koude starter als je aardappelsalade-textuur lust; vermijd als je warm wilt eten.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian boiled potatoes with a creamy huacatay, peanut, cheese, and chili sauce.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁水煮土豆配 huacatay 香草、花生、奶酪和辣椒奶油酱。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse gekookte aardappels met romige huacatay-, pinda-, kaas- en chilisaus.

cookingProfile.en: Similar in format to potatoes with sauce, but the black-mint huacatay flavor is the cue.
cookingProfile.zh: 形式像土豆配酱，识别重点是 huacatay 的黑薄荷香。
cookingProfile.nl: Lijkt op aardappel met saus, maar huacatay-zwarte-munt is het herkenningspunt.

description.en: Ocopa is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: huacatay, peanuts, cheese.
description.zh: 秘鲁香草花生土豆 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：huacatay、peanuts、cheese。
description.nl: Ocopa blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: huacatay, peanuts, cheese.

orderVerdict.en: Good if you like creamy herb-nut sauces; avoid with peanut allergy.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢草本坚果奶香酱时适合；花生过敏必须避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed als je romige kruid-notensaus lust; vermijden bij pinda-allergie.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian salad of broad beans, corn, tomato, onion, fresh cheese, olives, and herbs.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁沙拉，常有豆类、玉米、番茄、洋葱、鲜奶酪、橄榄和香草。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse salade van bonen, mais, tomaat, ui, verse kaas, olijven en kruiden.

cookingProfile.en: Fresh, chunky, and cool, more like a vegetable-cheese salad than a leafy green salad.
cookingProfile.zh: 清爽冷食且块状明显，更像蔬菜奶酪沙拉，不是单纯叶菜沙拉。
cookingProfile.nl: Fris, grof en koel, meer groente-kaassalade dan bladsalade.

description.en: Solterito is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: corn, fresh cheese, olives.
description.zh: 秘鲁豆奶酪沙拉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：corn、fresh cheese、olives。
description.nl: Solterito blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: corn, fresh cheese, olives.

orderVerdict.en: A good lighter vegetarian-style plate; skip if you want a warm main.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃较轻的素食型菜盘时适合；想要热主菜则不够。
orderVerdict.nl: Een goede lichtere vegetarische optie; vermijd als je een warm hoofdgerecht wilt.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian creole soup with beef, noodles, tomato, milk, egg, and ají panca.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁克里奥尔汤，含牛肉、面条、番茄、牛奶、鸡蛋和红辣椒。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse criolla-soep met rund, noedels, tomaat, melk, ei en ají panca.

cookingProfile.en: A warming noodle soup with creamy tomato-beef depth, not a clear broth.
cookingProfile.zh: 是暖胃面汤，番茄牛肉奶香较明显，不是清汤。
cookingProfile.nl: Een verwarmende noedelsoep met romige tomaat-runddiepte, geen heldere bouillon.

description.en: Sopa Criolla is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: ají panca, tomato-beef broth, milk.
description.zh: 秘鲁牛肉面汤 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：ají panca、tomato-beef broth、milk。
description.nl: Sopa criolla blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: ají panca, tomato-beef broth, milk.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a hearty noodle soup; skip if dairy or egg in soup sounds wrong.
orderVerdict.zh: 想喝厚实面汤时适合；不接受汤里有奶或蛋则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor stevige noedelsoep; sla over als melk of ei in soep je niet aanspreekt.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian shrimp chowder-like soup with milk, cheese, potato, corn, egg, and ají.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁虾浓汤，常有牛奶、奶酪、土豆、玉米、鸡蛋和辣椒。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse garnalensoep, chowderachtig met melk, kaas, aardappel, mais, ei en ají.

cookingProfile.en: Rich and creamy with shellfish flavor, closer to a meal soup than a light starter.
cookingProfile.zh: 浓郁奶香且有虾味，更像一餐汤，不是清淡前汤。
cookingProfile.nl: Rijk en romig met garnalensmaak, meer maaltijdsoep dan lichte starter.

description.en: Chupe de Camarones is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: shrimp, milk broth, ají amarillo.
description.zh: 秘鲁奶香虾汤 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：shrimp、milk broth、ají amarillo。
description.nl: Chupe de camarones blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: shrimp, milk broth, ají amarillo.

orderVerdict.en: A rich seafood soup if dairy is fine; avoid with shellfish allergy.
orderVerdict.zh: 能吃奶制品时是浓郁海鲜汤选择；甲壳类过敏要避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Een rijke zeevruchtensoep als zuivel kan; vermijden bij schaaldiersallergie.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian stew of dried potatoes with pork or chicken, peanuts, ají panca, and warm spices.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁干土豆炖菜，常配猪肉或鸡肉、花生、红辣椒和暖香料。
shortDescription.nl: Peruaanse stoof van gedroogde aardappel met varken of kip, pinda, ají panca en warme specerijen.

cookingProfile.en: Earthy, thick, and nutty, with a distinctive dried-potato texture.
cookingProfile.zh: 土香、浓稠且带坚果味，干土豆口感很有辨识度。
cookingProfile.nl: Aards, dik en nootachtig, met duidelijke gedroogde-aardappeltextuur.

description.en: Carapulcra is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: dried potato, peanuts, ají panca.
description.zh: 秘鲁干土豆炖肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：dried potato、peanuts、ají panca。
description.nl: Carapulcra blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: dried potato, peanuts, ají panca.

orderVerdict.en: Choose it for a deep earthy stew; avoid with peanut allergy or if dried-potato texture sounds odd.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃土香浓炖菜时适合；花生过敏或不喜欢干土豆口感则避开。
orderVerdict.nl: Kies dit voor diepe aardse stoof; vermijd bij pinda-allergie of als gedroogde aardappel vreemd klinkt.

shortDescription.en: Arequipa-style pork adobo braised with chicha or vinegar, ají panca, garlic, and spices.
shortDescription.zh: 阿雷基帕风格猪肉 adobo，用 chicha 或醋、红辣椒、蒜和香料炖制。
shortDescription.nl: Arequipa-stijl varkensadobo gestoofd met chicha of azijn, ají panca, knoflook en specerijen.

cookingProfile.en: Tangy, red, and pork-rich, often eaten as a hearty breakfast or lunch stew.
cookingProfile.zh: 酸香红亮、猪肉味浓，常作为厚实早餐或午餐炖菜。
cookingProfile.nl: Friszuur, rood en rijk aan varken, vaak als stevig ontbijt of lunchstoof.

description.en: Adobo Arequipeño is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: ají panca, pork, vinegar or chicha.
description.zh: 阿雷基帕腌炖猪肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：ají panca、pork、vinegar or chicha。
description.nl: Adobo Arequipeño blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: ají panca, pork, vinegar or chicha.

orderVerdict.en: Good for a tangy pork stew; skip if pork or vinegar-forward sauces are not for you.
orderVerdict.zh: 想吃酸香猪肉炖菜时适合；不吃猪肉或不喜欢醋香酱汁则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Goed voor frisse varkensstoof; vermijd als varken of azijnachtige saus niet past.

shortDescription.en: Andean earth-oven feast of meats, potatoes, sweet potatoes, corn, herbs, and sometimes beans.
shortDescription.zh: 安第斯土炉烤宴，包含肉类、土豆、红薯、玉米、香草，有时还有豆。
shortDescription.nl: Andes-aardovengerecht met vlees, aardappel, zoete aardappel, mais, kruiden en soms bonen.

cookingProfile.en: It is rustic and smoky-herbal, with multiple meats and tubers rather than one saucy stew.
cookingProfile.zh: 风格粗犷，有烟熏草本气息，是多种肉和根茎，不是一锅酱汁炖菜。
cookingProfile.nl: Rustiek en rokerig-kruidig, met meerdere soorten vlees en knollen, geen enkele sausstoof.

description.en: Pachamanca is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: earth oven, huacatay, mixed meats.
description.zh: 秘鲁土炉烤肉 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：earth oven、huacatay、mixed meats。
description.nl: Pachamanca blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: earth oven, huacatay, mixed meats.

orderVerdict.en: Best as a hearty regional feast plate; skip if mixed meats and heavy starches feel too much.
orderVerdict.zh: 作为厚实地方宴席菜很适合；不吃混合肉或不想要大量淀粉则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Het beste als stevig regionaal feestbord; vermijd als gemengd vlees en veel zetmeel te zwaar zijn.

shortDescription.en: Purple corn pudding flavored with fruit, cinnamon, clove-like spice, and sugar.
shortDescription.zh: 紫玉米甜羹，带水果、肉桂、丁香类香料和糖。
shortDescription.nl: Pudding van paarse mais met fruit, kaneel, kruidnagelachtige specerij en suiker.

cookingProfile.en: Served as a thick purple spoon dessert, often chilled or room temperature.
cookingProfile.zh: 以浓稠紫色甜羹上桌，常冷食或常温。
cookingProfile.nl: Als dikke paarse lepeldessert, vaak gekoeld of op kamertemperatuur.

description.en: Mazamorra Morada is kept as a verified peruvian reference because its ordering cues are specific: purple corn, cinnamon, fruit.
description.zh: 紫玉米甜羹 被保留为 verified，是因为点餐识别点明确：purple corn、cinnamon、fruit。
description.nl: Mazamorra morada blijft verified omdat de bestelkenmerken specifiek zijn: purple corn, cinnamon, fruit.

orderVerdict.en: A good non-dairy sweet if you like fruit-spiced pudding; skip if gelatinous texture bothers you.
orderVerdict.zh: 喜欢水果香料甜羹的话很适合，且通常不含奶；介意胶状口感则跳过。
orderVerdict.nl: Een goede zuivelarme zoetigheid als je fruit-kruidenpudding lust; vermijd als geltextuur stoort.

shortDescription.en: Peruvian sandwich cookies filled with dulce de leche or manjar blanco and dusted with powdered sugar.
shortDescription.zh: 秘鲁夹心小饼干，内夹牛奶焦糖/白奶酱，外撒糖粉。
